🇬🇧 Hello! I am the virtual assistant of SIA «MULTISPA».
   We offer rental and sale of scaffolding and formwork.

main_menu: How can I help you? Choose a section or ask your question:
timeout_message:
I can help you with:
• Equipment selection — I'll explain the differences between scaffolding and formwork types
• Estimated rental cost calculation
• Technical consultations about equipment

To prepare an offer, I will need:
📐 Object type and dimensions
📅 Work timeline
📎 Drawing or project (if available)

If you're not sure what equipment you need — just describe your task, and I'll help you choose! 💡
prices_info:
💰 Approximate rental prices:

🔩 Modular scaffolding — 2.20 €/m² wall + VAT / month
🔩 Facade (frame) scaffolding — 1.40 €/m² wall + VAT / month
🧱 Wall formwork (h=1.20 m) — 6.00 €/m² + VAT / week
📐 Slab formwork — 3.00 €/m² + VAT / week

⚠️ These are approximate prices. The final cost, as well as possible discounts, will be provided by a company representative.

💡 Want to calculate the estimated cost for your project? Click the button below!

consultation_help:
🎓 I'll help you understand our equipment!

We offer three categories:

🔩 **Scaffolding** — for working at height (facades, finishing, insulation)
   • Frame (facade) — simple and economical
   • Modular — versatile, for complex projects

🧱 **Wall formwork** (PIONBOX MINI) — for pouring walls, foundations, columns

📐 **Slab formwork** (RINGER) — for pouring ceilings, floor slabs

💡 If you're not sure what you need — just describe your task, and I'll help!

Choose what you'd like to learn more about:
scaffolding_comparison:
🔍 **Scaffolding types comparison:**

🔩 **Frame (Facade) Scaffolding:**
• Principle: pipe-in-pipe connection with bracing
• Simple assembly without small parts or threaded connections
• Ideal for: standard facade work, insulation, finishing
• Fixed working platform height
• 💰 Rental: 1.40 €/m² wall + VAT / month

🔩 **Modular Scaffolding:**
• Principle: wedge-lock connection, self-locking wedges
• Fast assembly and disassembly
• Withstands heavy loads with optimal stability
• Universal application, suitable for complex building configurations
• 💰 Rental: 2.20 €/m² wall + VAT / month

📌 **Recommendation:** For standard facade work, frame scaffolding is more economical. For industrial or non-standard projects — modular.

⚠️ These are approximate prices. The final cost and discounts will be provided by a company representative.
formwork_comparison:
🔍 **Formwork types comparison:**

🧱 **Wall / Foundation Formwork (PIONBOX MINI):**
• Purpose: vertical structures — walls, foundations, columns
• Withstands horizontal pressure of liquid concrete
• Panel height: 120 cm; widths: 20–90 cm
• 💰 Rental: 6.00 €/m² formwork + VAT / week

📐 **Slab Formwork (RINGER, Austria):**
• Purpose: horizontal structures — ceilings, floor slabs
• Supports vertical load of wet concrete
• Components: telescopic props, tripods, heads, H20 beams, plywood panels
• Fast and convenient setup
• 💰 Rental: 3.00 €/m² formwork + VAT / week

📌 **Simple rule:** For walls and foundations → wall formwork. For ceilings and slabs → slab formwork.

⚠️ These are approximate prices. The final cost and discounts will be provided by a company representative.
